summary: DHH describes discovering the song 'Give Me Strength' by Over the Rhine while watching a TV show called The Third Watch. The emotional ending of the episode featured the song, which compelled him to immediately search for it on Google. He found the band's website and a remix of the song, which he listened to repeatedly. He also noted that Dido co-wrote the track.
key_points: DHH discovered Over the Rhine's 'Give Me Strength' through a TV show's emotional scene
Google enabled instant music discovery from half-remembered lyrics — notable for 2001
The post captures early blogging culture: casual, personal, stream-of-consciousness sharing
money_quotes: Police and fire men and women going through the days trying to save everyone but themselves.
Get better at keeping your promises and give me the power to turn off or away from bad entertainment!
Google didn't dissappoint, of course, and I was at the Over the Rhine website in seconds.
key_insight: This earliest DHH blog post is a simple personal music recommendation with no tech or business content, offering a glimpse of the casual, enthusiastic voice that would later become influential in software discourse.
